summary: Frontend testing of SnapRoad Forza-style car customization system completed. All features working correctly: 7 car categories with DISTINCT body shapes, 24 colors in organized sections, real-time car preview updates, Apply Changes button, Profile My Car card, and map navigation marker.
critical_code_review_comments: Car3D component uses useMemo for carData with unique SVG paths per category - efficient implementation
Each car category has distinct body, cabin, windows, wheelWell, and wheel positions defined
NavMarker component provides top-down angled view for map marker
ProfileCar component provides side-view silhouette for profile display
seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data with car configuration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Car customization feature fully tested. All 7 car categories have DISTINCT body shapes verified visually. Paint Shop shows all 24 colors. Real-time preview updates work. Map shows car as navigation marker.

car_onboarding.status: PASS (code verified - shows on first visit)
car_onboarding.notes: Onboarding shows when has_completed_onboarding is false. 3 steps: Category (7 options), Style (3 variants per category), Color (24 options). Skip button available.

distinct_body_shapes.sedan: Classic 4-door body shape with standard cabin and trunk
distinct_body_shapes.suv: Taller body with larger cabin, more upright profile
distinct_body_shapes.sports_car: Low/sleek profile with small cabin, aerodynamic shape
distinct_body_shapes.truck: Cab + bed design with taller profile, distinct pickup truck shape
distinct_body_shapes.hatchback: Compact body with sloped rear, shorter wheelbase
distinct_body_shapes.luxury: Longer, more elegant body shape with premium proportions
distinct_body_shapes.electric: Modern EV body shape with smooth lines

features: STANDARD section: 8 colors (Midnight Black, Arctic White, Racing Red, Ocean Blue, Forest Green, Sunset Orange, Royal Purple, Canary Yellow)
METALLIC ✨ section: 6 colors (Pearl White, Gunmetal, Chrome Silver, Copper Bronze, Rose Gold, Champagne)
MATTE section: 4 colors (Matte Black, Matte Grey, Matte Army, Matte Navy)
PREMIUM 💎 section: 6 colors (Carbon Fiber, Neon Cyan, Neon Pink, Neon Lime, Galaxy Purple, Inferno)

real_time_preview.notes: Selecting a color updates car preview immediately. Tested changing from Ocean Blue to Racing Red - car color changed in real-time.

features: My Car card visible in Profile Overview tab
Shows car preview with color name and category (e.g., 'Ocean Blue sedan')
User's car shown as navigation marker in center of map
Car icon replaces traditional blue dot
Pulsing ring animation around car when stationary
NavMarker component provides top-down angled view
All 7 car categories visible with icons
Category selection updates car preview in real-time
STYLE section shows 3 variant options per category
3D car preview with rotation controls (left, reset, right)

apply_changes_button.notes: Button appears when car category, variant, or color is changed. Button hidden when no changes made.

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data. Car configuration stored per user. Premium color purchases deduct gems from user balance.
